abilities.name: inner-focus
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's intense focus prevents it from flinching or being affected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: multiscale
abilities.shortEffect: Halves damage taken from full HP.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon takes half as much damage when it is hit having full HP.
abilities.flavorText: Reduces the amount of damage the Pokémon takes while its HP is full.
